description:
The TextExpandIndicator component is used in inspectors to show whether or not a section like slots under another slot is expanded out and/or has any children items.

}}

fields.Text: The text to drive with the dropdown indication.
fields.SectionRoot: The slot where children items for a slot is placed for the UI visual.
fields.ChildrenRoot: The slot to check for children slots to tell if it has children or not.
fields.Closed: The string to display when the section is closed.
fields.Opened: The string to display when the section is opened.
fields.Empty: The string to display when ``ChildrenRoot`` is empty.
fields.CustomEmptyCheck: A custom check sync delegate to use to check if the target is empty.

usage: This component is combined with the Expander component to show the user that the expander has expanded, collapsed, or is empty using symbols.
